import json
import datetime
import threading
import os

class AuditLogger:
    def __init__(self, log_file_path="audit_trail.log"):
        self.log_file_path = log_file_path
        self.lock = threading.Lock()
        if not os.path.exists(self.log_file_path):
            with open(self.log_file_path, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                pass

    def _write_log(self, entry):
        with self.lock:
            with open(self.log_file_path, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(entry, f, ensure_ascii=False)
                f.write('\n')

    def _create_base_entry(self, user, event_type, resource_type=None, resource_id=None):
        return {
            "timestamp": datetime.datetime.now(datetime.timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            "user": user,
            "event_type": event_type,
            "resource_type": resource_type,
            "resource_id": str(resource_id) if resource_id is not None else None,
            "details": {}
        }

    def log_login(self, user: str, success: bool, ip_address: str = None, message: str = None):
        entry = self._create_base_entry(user, "LOGIN")
        entry["details"]["success"] = success
        entry["details"]["ip_address"] = ip_address
        entry["details"]["message"] = message if message else (f"User {'succeeded' if success else 'failed'} to log in.")
        self._write_log(entry)

    def log_create(self, user: str, resource_type: str, resource_id: str | int, new_data: dict, message: str = None):
        entry = self._create_base_entry(user, "CREATE", resource_type, resource_id)
        entry["details"]["new_data"] = new_data
        entry["details"]["message"] = message if message else f"Created new {resource_type} with ID {resource_id}."
        self._write_log(entry)

    def log_update(self, user: str, resource_type: str, resource_id: str | int, old_data: dict, new_data: dict, message: str = None):
        entry = self._create_base_entry(user, "UPDATE", resource_type, resource_id)
        entry["details"]["old_data"] = old_data
        entry["details"]["new_data"] = new_data
        entry["details"]["message"] = message if message else f"Updated {resource_type} with ID {resource_id}."
        self._write_log(entry)

    def log_delete(self, user: str, resource_type: str, resource_id: str | int, deleted_data: dict = None, message: str = None):
        entry = self._create_base_entry(user, "DELETE", resource_type, resource_id)
        entry["details"]["deleted_data"] = deleted_data
        entry["details"]["message"] = message if message else f"Deleted {resource_type} with ID {resource_id}."
        self._write_log(entry)

    def log_access(self, user: str, resource_type: str, resource_id: str | int = None, action: str = None, message: str = None):
        entry = self._create_base_entry(user, "ACCESS", resource_type, resource_id)
        entry["details"]["action"] = action if action else f"Accessed {resource_type}."
        entry["details"]["message"] = message if message else f"User accessed {resource_type}."
        self._write_log(entry)

    def log_custom_event(self, user: str, event_type: str, details: dict, resource_type: str = None, resource_id: str | int = None):
        entry = self._create_base_entry(user, event_type.upper(), resource_type, resource_id)
        entry["details"].update(details)
        self._write_log(entry)
